analysis.name: Solstice
analysis.summary: SLX 近期因Upbit上线和TVL突破5亿美元等利好上涨，但24小时涨幅已超21%，且早期空投抛压和上线暴跌历史提示风险。当前估值中等，但缺乏新鲜催化剂，短期追高需谨慎。

recommendation.invalidation: 若价格跌破0.18美元（近期支撑）或TVL大幅下降，则逻辑失效。

catalysts: Upbit上线后交易量激增，韩国市场情绪推动
TVL突破5亿美元，显示生态增长

latestNews.title: Upbit Adjusts Solstice (SLX) Listing Time by 30 Minutes
latestNews.reason: Upbit作为韩国最大交易所，上线带来流动性和关注度

latestNews.title: Solstice price surges as its TVL crosses $500M and a rare bullish pattern forms
latestNews.reason: TVL增长反映协议采用率提升，技术形态看涨

latestNews.title: Solstice token drops over 40% on launch day as airdrop recipients sell SLX
latestNews.reason: 早期空投抛压表明存在大量获利盘，可能限制涨幅

fundamentals: Solstice是DeFi收益层协议，将机构级收益策略代币化
总供应量10亿，流通约2.43亿，流通市值约4900万美元
代币用于治理和协议费用分配
marketRead: 24小时涨幅21%，但成交量5.29亿美元，换手率极高，显示投机情绪浓厚
价格距历史高点0.463美元仍跌56%，上方套牢盘压力大
Binance API受限，无法获取精确订单簿数据，流动性情况不明
risks: 早期空投抛压持续，上线首日暴跌40%历史重演风险
TVL增长可持续性存疑，若资金流出将打击信心
市场情绪过热，短期涨幅过大可能回调
Binance Alpha上线后价格波动剧烈，缺乏稳定支撑
watchlist: 是否有新的大额解锁或空投
sourceNotes: Binance API因地区限制无法获取实时行情，价格数据来自CoinMarketCap
新闻来源为Google News聚合，部分日期可能不准确
TVL数据未直接提供，来自新闻引用

profile.name: Solstice
profile.description: Solstice is the Yield Layer, a protocol bringing institutional-grade yield products on-chain for DeFi composability. Most on-chain yield has been leveraged on volatile assets. Institutional yield strategies, like delta-neutral funding capture, tokenized corporate credit, and sovereign-rate exposure, have historically sat behind compliance perimeters that public chains couldn't cross. Solstice closes that gap. The protocol wraps licensed off-chain strategies in a standard on-chain container, so the yield they produce flows across the DeFi ecosystem as composable tokens. Built for institutions. Open to everyone.
